title: peucedanum brachystylum
intro: Peucedanum brachystylum, also known as Korean angelica, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, characterized by its fern-like foliage and umbrella-shaped flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities, making it a valuable herb in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Peucedanum brachystylum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
